# Assessment Overview

This file is the entry point for supplementary assessment artifacts copied into this report's `facts/` directory.

## Available Documents

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level architecture and internal component relationship diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - Declared dependency categories, risk notes, and test dependency inventory.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - Service catalog, endpoint inventory, contracts, and request sequence flow.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Database configuration, entity model, repository methods, and data ownership analysis.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, secrets handling, and runtime settings inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Core domain workflows, rules, and business sequence documentation.
